sourceTitle: AI & Academic Integrity | Center for Teaching Innovation
evidenceSnippetOriginal: We currently do not recommend using current automatic detection algorithms for academic integrity violations using generative AI, given their unreliability and current inability to provide definitive evidence of violations.
